ground.what_this_is: This is a process control dashboard where you are currently viewing a specific step in a workflow (an 'ask' node) and selecting which AI model to run it with.
ground.what_you_can_do: You can click the 'Chat' or 'Embed' tabs to switch between the two available model lists, select a model from the list to apply to the current process step, and view the system's status indicators at the top and bottom.

howto.how_to_change: The control lives in the inspector region (Inspector.tsx); the refresh logic is driven by the live fleet wire (WIRE-intent or similar live sync mechanism).
howto.what: The refresh control on the inspector panel.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click to pull the latest state from the live model fleet and update the current node's configuration.

howto.how_to_change: This is a mockup-only element; it does not exist in the built code path. To make it appear, a developer must add a conditional rendering block in the model field component that displays this text when the 'transport' config flag is active.
howto.what: A static informational note displayed on the model configuration field.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the system's configuration rule that explains why this specific model option is currently hidden from the operator view.

howto.how_to_change: The text is generated dynamically based on the endpoint's configuration state; changing the underlying endpoint config in the fabric registry updates this view.
howto.what: A status indicator on the model configuration field showing the state of the embed endpoint.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the system's status regarding the embed endpoint configuration (specifically whether it is unconfigured).

howto.how_to_change: The surface is Settings.tsx; the layer switching logic is driven by the model selection wire (mockup-only; no built code path maps to it yet).
howto.what: The layers control on the settings dashboard.
howto.what_you_can_do: Toggle the layer view to switch between the 'Chat' and 'Embed' model lists for the current process step.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (0 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.
